    then(Traversal<T> another)
    Composes this hop and another hop so the result is the same as hop2(hop1(c)).

  • Method Details

    • hop

      T hop(T context)
      Hops from the given object to another one.
      Parameters:
      context -
      Returns:
      the destination object, or null, if a hop was not possible
